question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper mentions that V3 loop sequences were determined at screening from plasma samples of patients. Additionally, it states that sequences of the protease and reverse transcriptase (RT) genes were determined at baseline MVC in each laboratory.
sentences: "V3 loop sequences were determined at screening, and coreceptor use was predicted using 13 genotypic algorithms or combinations of algorithms."; "Sequences of the protease and reverse transcriptase (RT) genes were determined at baseline MVC in each laboratory using the ANRS consensus technique, ( http://www.hivfrenchresistance.org ), the Siemens TruGene kit, and the Abbott ViroSeq kit or an in-house method."

question: Does the paper report in vitro drug susceptibility data?
explain: The paper focuses on genotypic prediction of coreceptor use and virological response to Maraviroc (MVC) but does not mention any in vitro drug susceptibility testing data.
sentences: "We aimed at studying (i) the correlation of genotypic prediction of coreceptor use in comparison with a phenotypic assay and (ii) the relationship between genotypic prediction of coreceptor use at baseline and the virological response (VR) to a therapy including maraviroc (MVC)."

question: What were the GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates?
explain: The paper explicitly states the range of GenBank accession numbers for the sequenced HIV isolates.
sentences: "The reverse transcriptase, protease, and gp120 sequences from the patients in this study were given GenBank accession no. HM035546 to HM035976."

question: Which HIV species were studied in the paper?
explain: The paper consistently refers to HIV-1 throughout the text, including in the study population description and the methods section.
sentences: "Inclusion criteria for the MVC EAP were HIV-1 infection, ≥18 years of age, previous antiretroviral therapy, and virological failure with a plasma HIV-1 RNA load of >1,000 copies/ml."; "HIV-1 subtype was determined by phylogenetic analysis of RT and gp120 sequences."

question: Which HIV genes were reported to have been sequenced?
answer: Protease, PR; Reverse transcriptase, RT; Envelope
explain: The paper mentions sequencing of the protease and reverse transcriptase (RT) genes, as well as the gp120 sequence, which is part of the envelope gene.
sentences: "Sequences of the protease and reverse transcriptase (RT) genes were determined at baseline MVC in each laboratory using the ANRS consensus technique."; "The gp120 sequence analysis comprising the complete V3 loop sequence was performed from plasma sampled at the date of screening of the MVC EAP."

question: From which countries were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The paper specifies that the patients were screened for the Maraviroc Expanded Access Program (MVC EAP) in France and were included in the GenoTropism Study in 18 participating centers in France.
sentences: "The patients included in this study were screened for the Maraviroc Expanded Access Program (MVC EAP) in France between January, 2007 and August 2008."; "The patients were included in the GenoTropism Study in 18 participating centers in France."

question: From what years were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The paper mentions that the patients were screened for the Maraviroc Expanded Access Program (MVC EAP) in France between January 2007 and August 2008.
sentences: "The patients included in this study were screened for the Maraviroc Expanded Access Program (MVC EAP) in France between January, 2007 and August 2008."

question: What method was used for sequencing?
explain: The paper mentions the use of the Siemens TruGene kit and the Abbott ViroSeq kit, both of which are based on Sanger sequencing technology.
sentences: "Sequences of the protease and reverse transcriptase (RT) genes were determined at baseline MVC in each laboratory using the ANRS consensus technique, ( http://www.hivfrenchresistance.org ), the Siemens TruGene kit, and the Abbott ViroSeq kit or an in-house method."

question: Were samples cloned prior to sequencing?
explain: The paper does not mention any cloning of samples prior to sequencing.

question: Did samples undergo single genome sequencing?
explain: The paper does not mention the use of single genome sequencing. It refers to bulk sequencing methods.
sentences: "The bulk V3 sequences were determined by all participant laboratories."

question: What clinical specimens were sequenced?
explain: The paper specifies that plasma samples were used for sequencing the V3 loop and other genes.
sentences: "The gp120 sequence analysis comprising the complete V3 loop sequence was performed from plasma sampled at the date of screening of the MVC EAP."; "Sequences of the protease and reverse transcriptase (RT) genes were determined at baseline MVC in each laboratory using the ANRS consensus technique."

question: Were any sequences obtained from individuals with virological failure on a treatment regimen?
explain: The inclusion criteria for the study required patients to have virological failure with a plasma HIV-1 RNA load of >1,000 copies/ml.
sentences: "Inclusion criteria for the MVC EAP were HIV-1 infection, ≥18 years of age, previous antiretroviral therapy, and virological failure with a plasma HIV-1 RNA load of >1,000 copies/ml."

question: Were any sequences obtained from the proviral DNA reservoir?
explain: The paper does not mention obtaining sequences from the proviral DNA reservoir. It focuses on plasma samples.

question: Were the patients in the study in a clinical trial?
explain: The patients were part of the Maraviroc Expanded Access Program (MVC EAP) and the GenoTropism Study, which involved clinical follow-up and data collection.
sentences: "The patients included in this study were screened for the Maraviroc Expanded Access Program (MVC EAP) in France between January, 2007 and August 2008 and received MVC associated with an optimized background therapy if the result of the phenotypic assay for coreceptor use determination was CCR5."; "The patients were included in the GenoTropism Study in 18 participating centers in France."

question: How many individuals had samples obtained for HIV sequencing?
explain: The paper states that 189 patients had both Trofile and gp120 sequence determination and were included in the study comparing genotypic and phenotypic determinations of coreceptor use.
sentences: "Thus, 189 patients had both Trofile and gp120 sequence determination and were included in the study comparing genotypic and phenotypic determinations of coreceptor use."

question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from individuals who had previously received ARV drugs?
explain: The inclusion criteria for the study required patients to have previous antiretroviral therapy.
sentences: "Inclusion criteria for the MVC EAP were HIV-1 infection, ≥18 years of age, previous antiretroviral therapy, and virological failure with a plasma HIV-1 RNA load of >1,000 copies/ml."

question: Which drug classes were received by individuals in the study before sample sequencing?
explain: The paper mentions the use of nucleoside RT inhibitors, nonnucleoside RT inhibitors, protease inhibitors, and integrase inhibitors in the genotypic resistance analysis.
sentences: "A nonnucleoside RT inhibitor, a fusion inhibitor (enfuvirtide), or an integrase inhibitor (raltegravir) was scored as 1 when the virus was sensitive and 0 when the virus was resistant or possibly resistant. A boosted protease inhibitor was scored as 1 when the virus was sensitive, 0.5 when the virus was possibly resistant, and 0 when the virus was resistant."
